description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on every push and on a scheduled cron job. Use an ubuntu-latest job with read permission to repository contents and write permission to ID tokens. Configure the job to run in a matrix with Python versions 3.7, 3.8, 3.9, and 3.10. For each job, check out the repository, set up Python with the matrix version, configure AWS credentials with a role from secrets, install Poetry, load cached virtual environments, install dependencies with Poetry if necessary, and run tests with tox.
